title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
summary: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

title: California Strikes Deal With Anthropic to Bring Claude AI to State Agencies
summary: Anthropic’s agreement makes Claude the first AI tool available to all state agencies and local governments, at half price.

title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
summary: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.

title: Wall Street's Next Tokenization Test: BlackRock-Backed Securitize's Market Debut
summary: Securitize expects to begin trading next week under the ticker symbol “SECZ,” following the completion of a merger with a blank-check firm.

title: OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.6—But Only for Some Users Due to Trump Admin
summary: OpenAI introduced the GPT-5.6 family of AI models on Friday, but only limited users can access them for now thanks to the U.S. government.

title: Starlink veterans launch startup to broaden megaconstellation ownership
summary:
Former SpaceX engineers who helped build and scale Starlink have launched a startup aiming to deliver megaconstellations for governments and companies seeking more control over space-based infrastructure.
